content: LOOT sorts plugin load order using a community masterlist (per-game metadata: incompatibilities, requirements, groups) + user-editable userlist. Algorithm: load plugin+metadata, sort lexicographically for determinism, build graphs (non-masters, masters, groups), masters edge before non-masters, topological sort. Bethesda load order: ESM pinned top, then ESL, then ESP; 254 (FE) full-plugin limit + up to 4096 ESL light plugins (4096 FormID records each). Masters in plugin header must load first. libloot is the reusable library.
